description: Style NoteThis understated bow-detailed pair will charm you out of your haughty stilettos! Parade your girly appeal this summer with pastel shades and this pair of sandals for a sophisticated finish. Product DetailsForefoot straps featuring a bow detail on topPadded footbed with a brand patch at the heelTPU outsole with a heel patchMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
